name: BinaryFilterExpressionCollection
summary: The BinaryFilterExpressionCollection class represents a collection of BinaryFilterItem objects. The class is used to represent linear expressions. This class cannot be inherited.

constructors.name: BinaryFilterExpressionCollection
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the BinaryFilterExpressionCollection class.

methods.name: Add
methods.summary: Adds a BinaryFilterExpressionItem object at the end of the collection.

params.name: Item
params.doc: The object to add to the collection. This value cannot be null.

throws.when: Thrown when the supplied item is null.

methods.name: Clear
methods.summary: Removes all the elements from the collection.

methods.name: Contains
methods.summary: Determines whether an element is in the collection.

params.name: Item
params.doc: The object to locate in the collection. This value cannot be null.

throws.when: Thrown when the supplied item is null.

methods.name: CopyTo
methods.signature: public void CopyTo(BinaryFilterExpressionItem[] Array, int ArrayIndex)
methods.summary: Copies the collection to the input array.

params.name: Array
params.doc: The input array. This value cannot be null.

throws.when: Thrown when the supplied item is null.
Thrown when the supplied array index is out of bounds.

methods.name: GetFirst
methods.summary: Gets the first item of the collection.

returns.doc: The first item of the collection.

methods.name: GetLast
methods.summary: Gets the last item of the collection.

returns.doc: The last item of the collection.

methods.name: IndexOf
methods.summary: Searches for the specified BinaryFilterExpressionItem in the collection and returns a zero-based index if found.

params.name: Item
params.doc: The item to search for. This value cannot be null.

returns.doc: The zero-based index of the item in the collection. -1 if not found.

throws.when: Thrown when the supplied item is null.

methods.name: Insert
methods.signature: public void Insert(int Index, BinaryFilterExpressionItem Item)
methods.summary: Inserts an element in the collection at a specified index.

params.name: Index
params.doc: The zero-based index at which the item shoud be inserted.

params.name: Item
params.doc: The item to insert. This value cannot be null.

throws.when: Thrown when the supplied item is null.
Thrown when the supplied index is out of bounds.

methods.name: IsFirst
methods.summary: Determines whether an element is the first item of the collection.

params.name: BinaryFilterExpressionItem
params.doc: The element to evaluate. This value cannot be null.

returns.doc: True if the element is the first item.

throws.when: Thrown when the supplied item is null.

methods.name: IsLast
methods.summary: Determines whether an element is the last item of the collection.

params.name: BinaryFilterExpressionItem
params.doc: The element to evaluate. This value cannot be null.

returns.doc: True if the element is the last item.

throws.when: Thrown when the supplied item is null.

methods.name: Remove
methods.summary: Removes the first occurrence of a specific object from the collection.

params.name: Item
params.doc: The object to remove from the collection. This value cannot be null.

returns.doc: True if item was successfully removed. False otherwise.

methods.name: RemoveAt
methods.summary: Removes the element at the specified index from the collection.

params.name: Index
params.doc: The index of the item to remove.

throws.when: Thrown when the supplied index is out of bounds.

methods.name: ToString
methods.summary: Creates a string representation of the current object.

returns.doc: A new string representing the current object.

properties.name: Count
properties.summary: Gets the number of elements actually contained in the collection.

properties.name: IsEnable
properties.summary: Gets or sets the enabled state of the filter expression.

properties.name: IsReadOnly
properties.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the collection is read-only.

properties.name: IsSynchronized
properties.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the collection supports multithreading.

properties.name: Item
properties.summary: Gets or sets the item at a specific index.
